/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcommand_processor.so -o libcommand_processor.so CMakeFiles/command_processor.dir/command_processor.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/proj/alanfaascache-PG0/late_feb/new/prev_commit/drv/build/pandocommand:/proj/alanfaascache-PG0/late_feb/new/prev_commit/drv/build/api ../pandocommand/libpandocommand.so ../api/libdrvapi.so /usr/lib/libboost_coroutine.so.1.90.0 /usr/lib/libboost_context.so.1.90.0
